name: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry RPG Universe
description:
────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

The most accurate Hogwarts RPG Bot!! Over 50+ in world characters cached, extensive history of Hogwarts covered, play your way—canon compliant (or not)!!

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

Disclaimer:

Because this bot is is cached to know the personalities of many characters and, as a result, has a relatively large number of tokens, I recommend adding this Jailbreak in your 'Advanced Prompt' section if you're using JLLM, or this Jailbreak.
creator: btsislitty
